form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr2) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 5.5 m by Gottago Barney (2:00.70) in Up to 1 LTW on April 10 at $9.50. Before that, a game effort when 2nd (Fr3) over 1780m after being wide early at this track beaten 2.25 m by Magic Jujon (2:12.80) in 3yo+ No NR on April 2 at $2.90. Winning claims from the ace draw.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a game effort when 2nd (Fr3) over 1780m at this track, beaten 5 m by Thats Our Boy (2:10.00) in 3yo+ Up to 1 LTW on April 9 at $3.50. Leading player.

form.formComment: Resuming after four-and-a-half months off the scene. Finished off last campaign when beaten by 4.5 m finishing second behind My Ultimate Zander at this track over 1780m in a 2yo No NR on December 10 at $31. Keep safe.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resuming after four-and-a-half months off the scene. Finished off last campaign when beaten by 4.5 m finishing second behind My Ultimate Zander at this track over 1780m in a 2yo No NR on December 10 at $31. Keep safe.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Utilized the sprint lane in the run to the finish.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run he 4th (Sr1) over 1780m at this track, at the bell was 5th-8.3m on the pegs beaten 11 m by Magic Jujon (2:08.80) in 2yo No NR on November 22 at $21. Expecting a good return.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced when Im Here To Party broke.
Raced roughly for a short distance entering the first turn.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Sr1) over 1780m at this track beaten 4.5 m by Magic Jujon (2:12.80) in 3yo+ No NR on April 2 at $17. Two runs back won by a nose as favourite (Fr2) overraced, at this track (2:11.90) beating Saint Maharg in 2yo No NR on November 13 at $1.90 at the bell was 2nd-0.1m 2WNC. Prefer others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Restrained at the start to a rearward trailing position.
Led the one wide line in the early and middle stages if the event.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. His previous first-up run was successful when he won by a neck as favourite when driven back in the field, (Fr4) held up early, at Albion Park (2:00.90) beating Wicked Ark in Up to 1 LTW on October 9 at $1.90. Can make a winning return.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait on the turn into the front straight on the final occasion.
